problem_text_cn: 4-11 光滑水平桌面上有一轻质细杆，杆可绕过中心O点的竖直轴无摩擦地转动。有四个质量相同的小球，其中两个分别固定在细杆两端$A_1$和$A_2$处，另外两个穿在细杆上可沿杆无摩擦自由滑动，它们的初始位置分别在$OA_1$和$OA_2$的中点。今使系统在极短时间内获得绕O轴转动角速度，而后让其自由运动，可动小球将沿杆朝固定小球撞去，试求动球相对细杆初始径向加速度与最后和固定球碰前瞬间径向加速度的比值。
problem_text_en: 4-11 On a smooth horizontal table, there is a light thin rod that can rotate without friction about a vertical axis through its center O. There are four balls of equal mass; two are fixed at the ends $A_1$ and $A_2$ of the rod, and the other two are threaded on the rod and can slide along it without friction, with their initial positions at the midpoints of $OA_1$ and $OA_2$, respectively. The system is given an angular velocity about the O‑axis in a very short time, after which it is left to move freely. The movable balls will slide along the rod toward the fixed balls. Find the ratio of the initial radial acceleration of a movable ball relative to the rod to its radial acceleration just before it collides with a fixed ball.
problem_solution_cn:
解 将细杆长记为$4b$，各球质量记为$m$，系统初始角速度记为$\omega_0$，而后动球与O点的距离为$r$时的系统角速度记为$\omega$，动球径向速度记为$v_r$，径向加速度记为$a_r$。
参考图4-9，考虑到$r$初始值为$b$，相对O点的角动量守恒式为
$$ 2m\omega r^{2}+2m\omega(2b)^{2}=2m\omega_0 b^{2}+2m\omega_0(2b)^{2}, $$
系统动能守恒式为
$$ 2m(v_r^{2}+\omega^{2}r^{2})+2m(\omega\cdot2b)^{2}=2m\omega_0^{2}b^{2}+2m(\omega_0\cdot2b)^{2}, $$
联立后消去$\omega$，可得
$$ v_r^{2}+\frac{25\omega_0^{2}b^{4}}{r^{2}+4b^{2}}=5\omega_0^{2}b^{2}. $$
两边对$t$求导，得
$$ a_r=\frac{25\omega_0^{2}b^{4}r}{(r^{2}+4b^{2})^{2}}. $$
本题所求比值为
$$ a_r\big|_{r=b}:a_r\big|_{r=2b}=32:25. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution Denote the rod length as $4b$, the mass of each ball as $m$, the initial angular velocity of the system as $\omega_0$, and let $\omega$ be the angular velocity when the movable balls are at distance $r$ from O, $v_r$ their radial velocity, and $a_r$ their radial acceleration.
Referring to Figure 4‑9, noting that initially $r=b$, the angular momentum conservation about O gives
$$ 2m\omega r^{2}+2m\omega(2b)^{2}=2m\omega_0 b^{2}+2m\omega_0(2b)^{2}, $$
and conservation of kinetic energy gives
$$ 2m(v_r^{2}+\omega^{2}r^{2})+2m(\omega\cdot2b)^{2}=2m\omega_0^{2}b^{2}+2m(\omega_0\cdot2b)^{2}. $$
Eliminating $\omega$ from these equations yields
$$ v_r^{2}+\frac{25\omega_0^{2}b^{4}}{r^{2}+4b^{2}}=5\omega_0^{2}b^{2}. $$
Differentiating with respect to $t$ gives
$$ a_r=\frac{25\omega_0^{2}b^{4}r}{(r^{2}+4b^{2})^{2}}. $$
The required ratio is
$$ a_r\big|_{r=b}:a_r\big|_{r=2b}=32:25. $$
img_cn: 图4-9展示了一根可绕中心O竖直轴无摩擦转动的轻质细杆，杆两端A1、A2处各固定一个质量为m的小球，另有两个相同质量的小球穿在杆上，初始时位于OA1、OA2的中点。杆长标注为4b。图4-9显示了系统的初始构型及小球位置，是解题的几何基础。
img_en: Figure 4-9 shows a light thin rod that can rotate frictionlessly about a vertical axis through its center O. At the ends A₁ and A₂, a ball of mass m is fixed; two additional balls of the same mass are threaded on the rod, initially positioned at the midpoints of OA₁ and OA₂. The rod length is marked as 4b. Figure 4-9 displays the initial configuration of the system and the positions of the balls, providing the geometric basis for the solution.
